title: coelogyne quadricarinata
intro: Coelogyne quadricarinata, also known as the four-keeled coelogyne, is an orchid species native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Coelogyne quadricarinata are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically made into a decoction or tea, which is consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
